Join Us

Open positions for motivated students

We welcome students interested in electrochemical diagnostics, battery interfaces, degradation, corrosion, solid-state electrolytes, and polymer electrolytes.

Who should apply?

Students who enjoy connecting electrochemical measurements with physical mechanisms are encouraged to contact us. Experience with batteries, materials characterization, impedance analysis, MATLAB/Python, or electrochemical instrumentation is helpful but not required.

Research interests

Batteries, EIS/DRT, PITT/GITT, QCM, corrosion, solid-state electrolytes, polymer electrolytes, and AI-assisted electrochemical analysis.

Programs

M.S., Ph.D., and combined M.S.–Ph.D. positions may be available depending on research projects and funding.

How to contact

Please send a CV, transcript, and a brief statement of research interests.

Email:
yoonlab@khu.ac.kr

YOON LAB

Electrochemical Engineering Lab
Department of Chemical Engineering, Kyung Hee University

Contact

Seoul, Republic of Korea
yoonlab@khu.ac.kr

Research Keywords

EIS/DRT · PITT/GITT · QCM · Battery interfaces · Corrosion · Solid-state electrolytes
